You can select up to six Pokémon to use for the Unity Raid.

If all of your Pokémon faint, they will automatically revive after a period of time.

When the Raid Boss has only a little health left, you can finish it off with a Unity Attack.

To charge a Unity Attack, raise and hold your device in the air with the other Trainers in the battle!

Hold your device in the air
to charge your attack!

The shield is wearing down!
Unite and attack it again!

Almost there!
Give it all you’ve got!

{0} is protecting itself!
Unite and attack together!
Raise your device in the air to get your Pokémon!

Unity Raids are unique battles where you must work together with a massive number of Trainers to defeat the Raid Boss.

You cannot flee this battle once it begins.

You can select up to six Pokémon to use for the Unity Raid.

If all of your Pokémon faint, they will automatically revive after a period of time.

When the Raid Boss has only a little health left, you can finish it off with a Unity Attack.

To charge a Unity Attack, raise and hold your device in the air with the other Trainers in the battle!
Allow use of device's flashlight during raid.
Your device’s flashlight will be used during the raid.
Mewtwo attacks with tough fists for 10 minutes. Enables your Pokémon to break two shields in Super Mega Raids.
You will receive Stardust instead of Link Charges. To claim more Link Charges, use Link Charges to join Mega Raids.
A pack of 50 Link Charges, used to join Mega Raids in-person or remotely.

GO Pass Deluxe: Road of Legends
Earn additional rewards and unlock a Gold Bottle Cap at Rank 100!

Purchase GO Pass Deluxe: Road of Legends to unlock the following rewards! • One Gold Bottle Cap, which is used to start a Hyper Training course that you can complete to increase all of a Pokémon’s stats • Team Leader Pose for your avatar • An encounter with Mewtwo with a guaranteed Special Background • Exclusive hatch- and raid-focused bonuses • And much more! Trainers can earn 1,000 GO Points daily from July 6 to 10 in addition to the GO Points earned by Pass Tasks. There’s no limit on how many GO Points can be earned during Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global on July 11 and 12!

More Trainers with Mega-Evolved Pokémon required to start the raid.
Pokémon can unlock an additional charged attack through Mega Evolution. This charged attack is available as long as the Pokémon is Mega Evolved.

Evolve Mewtwo into Mega Mewtwo X to unlock this Adventure Effect.

Mewtwo punches with full, concentrated power for 5 minutes. Increases damage against Mega Pokémon in Raids and enables your Mega Pokémon to break two shields in Super Mega Raids.

Evolve Mewtwo into Mega Mewtwo Y to unlock this Adventure Effect.

Mewtwo releases a hunk of psychic energy for 5 minutes, revealing Pokémon with high stat potential before they are caught.

This rare Floette holds a plant that died out in ancient times. The Pokémon is said to harbor an incredible power.
This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.
It resembles an X as it flies through the air with 50 million volts of electricity sparking from its ears and forked tail.
It fires bolts of electricity from the tip of its tail and from the spiky tufts of fur growing out of its temples. This electricity forms the letter Y.
Using fur that it has made into sharp, clawlike shapes, it cuts down foes with a single blow. This is an act of kindness to keep them from suffering.
By completely cloaking itself in its aura, Mega Lucario Z can parry all manner of attacks, battling as if it were gracefully dancing.
Tatsugiri’s brain has been invigorated by Mega Evolution, making it even wilier. It can create and command copies of itself.
It solidifies the energy of Mega Evolution, building up an overflowing pile to launch as projectiles. These projectiles explode on contact.
Using the energy of Mega Evolution, it creates a dish to ride upon, allowing it to move with total freedom—even through the air.
Baxcalibur’s dorsal blade has grown even more massive thanks to Mega Evolution. This Pokémon fires beams from the hilt at its solar plexus.

More Sobble are appearing in the wild!
Five-star raids will appear at Pokémon Center Gyms during scheduled event hours
Making new friends, seeing new sights, trying new foods... All of this is so exciting!
And even more exciting than that—I’ve heard the Mythical Pokémon Zeraora is in the area!
Maybe it could sense this gathering of strong Trainers like you and came to investigate.
Well, we’d better get out there and show it what we’re made of!
*huff huff* Wait! Let me catch my breath... Phew! You sure took what I said about getting out there to heart, didn’t you?
One thing’s for sure—if Zeraora is watching, it’ll be plenty impressed by your skills!
And on that note, I actually have a hunch it’s closer than we think. I’ve spied a few flashes of light off in the distance.
And wherever Zeraora runs, you get flashes of lightning and the echo of thunder. I guess we’re not the only ones getting charged up!
Here’s a question! Do you know how Zeraora fights? It’s a real shock!
You see, it electrifies its claws and uses them to tear its opponents apart.
Even if they manage to dodge the attack, they’ll still get zapped by the flying sparks. Watt incredible power! Ahem.
In any event, we’d best prepare ourselves.
I’ll try to collect information on its whereabouts while you get out there and power up your knowledge on Electric types.
Think fast—what are the strengths and weaknesses of Electric-type Pokémon?
That’s right! They’re super effective against Water- and Flying-type Pokémon and weak against Ground types.
You’re pretty quick on your feet! That’ll come in handy.
Zeraora runs as fast as lightning strikes. That’s plenty speedy, but I’m sure you’ll be able to catch it.
So, up for some storm chasing? Let’s GO!
Whew! All that exploring really zapped my energy. I could use a break, but you look like you’re bursting with energy!
And speaking of energy, did you know that electricity sparks from the pads on Zeraora’s limbs?
I’m glad I don’t have that power—imagine trying to brush my hair!
What’s say we make use of that energy of yours and see what you’re made of? Go get ’em!
I just ran into Spark and some new friends he made—and guess what? They spotted Zeraora not far from here!
That might explain the unusual charge to the air. I can feel my hair standing on end—and not because of my styling gel, either! Haha!
We must be close. Go take a look around!
Just look at all those sparks. If I could just measure the voltage... *ZAP*
Whoa! Talk about energy to spare!
I’d love to observe Zeraora out on the field. You should spend some time getting to know each other!
You know what I’d call that? A total success! Thank you for always helping me with my research.
And for your efforts, you’ve got a powerful new friend to join you on your journey.
You both deserve a round of applause for all your efforts. Maybe even a thunderclap! Haha!
Anyway, I can’t wait to see how far you two will go together.
Something tells me we’ve only seen the first sparks of Zeraora’s potential. But for now, we celebrate!
Making new friends, seeing new sights, trying new foods... All of this is so exciting!

Ticket for the Sobble Community Day Special Research available in the shop
Knock it out of the park!
My research suggests Mewtwo is active in the area. You may be familiar with Mewtwo—one of the most extraordinary Pokémon ever documented.
Its origins are unique among Pokémon I’ve studied: years of genetic engineering and DNA experimentation.
What scientists created was a Pokémon made to battle. The power it carries as a result... Well, the evidence speaks for itself.
And from what I know of it, it won’t take on just any Trainer.
With your skills, you could be exactly the type of Trainer that Mewtwo is looking to battle, so stay sharp and keep your Pokémon close!
%PLAYERNAME%, this may be bigger than Mewtwo alone.
I’ve been tracking some extraordinary readings, and I believe it’s Mega-Evolved Mewtwo who may be looking for a challenger.
I don’t want to alarm you, but I also don’t want you going in underprepared.
Start getting your team ready, %PLAYERNAME%! This is exactly the kind of thing that gets a Pokémon Professor’s heart racing!
%PLAYERNAME%, before you head into battle, you should take some time to explore Mega Evolution.
Every Mega Evolution is different, and the better informed you are, the stronger you’ll be when you face Mega-Evolved Mewtwo.
Take a look at the Mega-Evolved Pokémon out there. What makes each one distinct? What takes you by surprise?
Mega-Evolved Mewtwo will demand your very best, so now is the perfect time to brush up on what you’ve learned.
Explore, reflect, and let your discoveries guide you.
Knowledge is your greatest ally here, %PLAYERNAME%, so go out there and find it!
You did it, %PLAYERNAME%! Watching you out there had me on the edge of my seat.
But the work doesn’t stop here. If anything, this is where the most exciting part begins.
Take the time to really understand Mega-Evolved Mewtwo—its moves, its strengths.
Don’t rush. Learn alongside your new partner and let that understanding grow naturally.
I have a feeling the two of you will do incredible things together.
%PLAYERNAME%, stop for a moment and take stock of what you’ve achieved here.
I was just telling you about Mewtwo’s origins, and now you’re standing here with Mega-Evolved Mewtwo by your side.
This reminds me why I chose to become a professor. The wonder never gets old.
But beyond the data and discoveries, I am genuinely proud of you, %PLAYERNAME%.
The world of Pokémon is vast and full of marvels beyond our wildest imaginations. Today you proved you have everything it takes to rise to whatever challenge may come next.
Now go celebrate! You and Mewtwo have earned it!
The moment has arrived, %PLAYERNAME%, and only one decision stands between you and Mewtwo.
Mega-Evolved Mewtwo has two distinct forms, each fascinating—and powerful!
Mega Mewtwo X’s power augments its muscles. It has a grip strength of one ton and can sprint a hundred meters in two seconds flat!
Mega Mewtwo Y gets smaller, but its mental power grows even more formidable.
Both forms are proof of what Mega Evolution can unlock in an already powerful Pokémon.
There’s no wrong path here. Trust your judgement and go show Mewtwo what you’re made of!
A bold choice, %PLAYERNAME%! Mega Mewtwo X is a Psychic and Fighting type—prepare for a relentless battle.
Stay focused and be ready for its overwhelming physical power!
A wise choice, %PLAYERNAME%! Mega Mewtwo Y is a Psychic type—its mental power will be your greatest challenge.
Team GO Rocket Leader Arlo has been spotted in the area, and I’m not buying that it’s a coincidence. This has to be connected to capturing Mewtwo.
But here’s the thing now: Mewtwo wants to battle you, and I think a Mega Evolution is on the horizon.
